title: GPT-3 175B Model Training
description:
GPT-3 (Generative Pre-trained Transformer 3) is a 175 billion parameters language model trained by OpenAI.

Based on a research preprint paper describing GPT-3 foundation and fine-tuning (Patterson et al., 2021), researchers explained the training process for operational deployment, resulting in 550 tonnes of CO2e total emissions. Training consumed an estimate of 1,287,000 kWh of electricity 90% of which were used to power over 2,895,750 GPU hours using Nvidia A100 80GB GPUs in Microsoft Azure Datacenters of 2020. They have a carbon intensity of 0,429 kgCO2e/kWh and a PUE of 1.1, resulting in the last 10% of electricity consumption, that is equal to 128,700 kWh used in datacenter cooling, lighting and other overhead systems.

consumer.name: Infrastructure overhead
consumer.description: Total facility energy consumption with a PUE of 1.1 (Datacenter cooling,ligthing and other overhead systems)
